TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Willie_Adams, title = Willie_Adams, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Willie_Adams} }

S.FORM: Willie Adams hya'ga qutux sa sinsyuw sinmung ptkura' mari' na Amirika' quw cyux niya' pcyuwagun. kinwagiq niya' ga 180 senci', kinz'usuw niya' ga 73 kiru gramu. kki'an niya' tkura' mari' ga pklahang sa kska' balay hiya'. ryax pincyuwagan niya' ga yasa knaki' niya' sa National Basketball League NBA krayryax. ryax 'nwah niya' mspung mari' ga aring kawas 1973 ruw mucing kawas 1983. Pllpgun 'nagal niya' tins' kwara' ga 3.6 tins' niya'. Willie Adams sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Willie Adams hya'ga qutux sa sinsyuw sinmung ptkura' mari' na Amirika' quw cyux niya' pcyuwagun. kinwagiq niya' ga 180 senci', kinz'usuw niya' ga 73 kiru gramu. kki'an niya' tkura' mari' ga pklahang sa kska' balay hiya'. ryax pincyuwagan niya' ga yasa knaki' niya' sa National Basketball League NBA krayryax. ryax 'nwah niya' mspung mari' ga aring kawas 1973 ruw mucing kawas 1983. Pllpgun 'nagal niya' tins' kwara' ga 3.6 tins' niya'. Willie Adams sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: willie a*ams~…ē ńßja Ē…£a qutux s~…ēa s~…ēins~…ējuw s~…ēinmuŇč ptkura Ē mari Ē na amirika Ē quw ¶~ ®jux nija Ē p ¶~ ®juwa…£un. kinwa…£iq nija Ē …£a *** s~…ēen ¶~ ®i Ē, kinz Ēus~…ēuw nija Ē …£a ** kiru …£ramu. kki Ēan nija Ē tkura Ē mari Ē …£a pklańßaŇč s~…ēa ks~…ēka Ē ő≤alaj ńßija Ē. rjax pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nija Ē …£a jas~…ēa knaki Ē nija Ē s~…ēa national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all lea…£ue nő≤a krajrjax. rjax Ēnwańß nija Ē ms~…ēpuŇč mari Ē …£a ariŇč kawas~…ē **** ruw mu ¶~ ®iŇč kawas~…ē ****. pllp…£un Ēna…£al nija Ē tins~…ē Ē kwara Ē …£a *.* tins~…ē Ē nija Ē. willie a*ams~…ē s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
